query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_orders, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN created_at > '2026-03-13 04:49:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as orders_after_proxy_fix,
  MAX(created_at) as latest_order
FROM orders;

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_positions,
  SUM(CASE WHEN created_at > '2026-03-13 04:49:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as positions_after_proxy_fix,
  MAX(created_at) as latest_position
FROM positions;
